Smalbach, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to Peter A. Smalbach off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Court ordered Charles Edward Merrill, Esq., sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear.
